user.title: AGL refresh token
user.description: Paste the `refresh_token` from your AGL iOS app session (captured via a proxy — see README). This is temporary; a browser-based login will replace this in a future version.

select_contract.title: Select contract
select_contract.description: Multiple electricity contracts were found. Select the one to monitor.

error.invalid_auth: Refresh token is invalid or has been revoked.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach AGL. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This AGL contract is already configured.
